report_metadata.title: PROSECUTION-GRADE SEC FORENSIC ANALYSIS
report_metadata.classification: DOJ Criminal Division - Fraud Section Standards

applicable_criminal_statutes: 18 U.S.C. § 1350 - SOX 906 Criminal Certification (up to 20 years)

detailed_violations.statutory_text: Any change in the beneficial ownership of such equity securities... shall be reported to the Commission... Code interpretations require accurate price disclosure.

detailed_violations.statutory_text: Every person who is directly or indirectly the beneficial owner... shall file... a statement with the Commission... within two business days following the day on which the transaction was executed.

detailed_violations.evidence_summary:
Owner: Slusher John F
Shares: 100,000
Price: $0.00
Code: M - Exercise of derivative
Acquired/Disposed: D

detailed_violations.statutory_text: The principal executive officer and principal financial officer... shall each certify in each annual or quarterly report filed... that they have reviewed the report and based on their knowledge, the report does not contain any untrue statement of a material fact...
detailed_violations.description: SOX Section 302 certification appears deficient. CEO and CFO must certify accuracy of financial statements under 15 U.S.C. § 7241.
detailed_violations.evidence_summary:
Certification patterns found: 3/6 expected
Required: Exhibit 31.1 (CEO), Exhibit 31.2 (CFO)
17 CFR § 240.13a-14(a) compliance in question.
detailed_violations.exact_quote: SOX 302 certification review indicates potential deficiency
detailed_violations.enforcement_precedent: SEC v. Diebold (2010), In re Navistar (2013)
